description: Composition Black solid kurta, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with short buttoned opening, three quarter length sleeves, tri-coloured weaved panel around the neck and sleeve edges and side vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately as colour may bleed Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron This is a lovely black-coloured kurta from aurelia with an Indian weave around the neckline which makes this perfect for an occasion requiring a traditional outfit, also you can pop it on over jeans for an easy, comfortable look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 35”
